description_long: This cabinetry unit is a modern, modular kitchen ensemble featuring a combination of tall, base, and wall cabinets. The left side includes a tall pantry cabinet with integrated appliances, likely an oven and refrigerator, while the central section features a countertop with a built-in sink and multiple drawers and doors below. Above the counter, there are wall-mounted cabinets with a wood finish, providing additional storage and a visual contrast to the lower units. The cabinetry is finished in a mix of matte light gray and wood textures, with sleek, minimalist handles. The overall design is linear and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors. The unit stands on small adjustable feet, elevating it slightly above the floor.
description: A modern modular kitchen cabinetry set with tall, base, and wall cabinets in matte gray and wood finishes, featuring integrated appliances and sleek handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of tall, base, and wall cabinets, with visible handles, integrated appliances, and a central sink.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinetry and the slim profile of the unit, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of the cabinetry, with no visible handles or appliances, emphasizing the unit's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth and vertical alignment of the cabinetry, similar to view 1 but from the other end.
attribute_cabinet_type: kitchen suite (tall pantry cabinet, base cabinet, wall cabinet)
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, and drawers
